positive: A symmetrical, complex cosmic forest mandala design. The central subject features stylized bioluminescent flora, floating astronomical constellations, and interwoven mystical geometric patterns. The palette must consist of deep midnight indigo, vibrant emerald green, and glowing ethereal gold accents, all dramatically contrasted against a pure, absolute pitch black background. The style is a fusion of intricate neo-geometric line art and vaporwave bioluminescence, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes and crystal-like detail, optimized for a central apparel print. High contrast, symmetrical composition, cinematic studio lighting, ultra detailed.
negative: blurry, low resolution, cropped, out of frame, watermark, signature, text, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noise, jpeg artifacts, simple, monotone
